personalInfo.name: MIKITA KAVALIOU
personalInfo.title: Senior Full-Stack Engineer | Next.js, TypeScript & AI
personalInfo.professionalObjective: Cloud-native & AI-focused Full-Stack Engineer with 3+ years of experience architecting scalable B2B/B2C SaaS platforms. Expert in Next.js 15, PostgreSQL optimization, and complex AI workflow integration (RAG, LLM Orchestration). Proven track record of reducing system latency by 60%, directly improving user retention through rigorous Clean Architecture and SOLID principles.
personalInfo.status: Based in Grenoble, France. Available for immediate start.

experience.title: Full Stack Software Engineer
responsibilities: Architected Lexity: Built a multimodal AI ecosystem (Next.js 15, Gemini, Groq) with automated failover. Implemented RAG patterns, ensuring sub-second latency and 99.9% availability.
Engineered ZIRO.FIT: Developed a B2B2C SaaS; optimized Raw SQL aggregations to reduce load times by 60%, directly increasing user engagement and conversion rates.
Developed Interly: Shipped an AI interview platform featuring real-time Web Audio API and custom Spaced Repetition System (SRS), driving rapid organic growth through premium UX.

experience.title: Full Stack Web Developer
responsibilities: Modernization & Architecture: Led the transition from legacy PHP to a modern decoupled stack (Next.js/Node.js), significantly improving system scalability and maintainability.
Performance Optimization: Refactored MySQL queries and implemented Redis caching, reducing response times by 30% and decreasing bounce rates on key landing pages.
Fintech Integrations: Deployed complex Stripe billing flows (subscriptions/webhooks), resulting in a 5% increase in conversion rates for premium services.
Mentoring & Standards: Technical lead for TypeScript adoption; established Clean Architecture standards and mentored junior developers.
